emotional-signal-decoding-latency.text: This Layer 0 mechanism commonly expresses as Layer 1 alexithymia when emotional load is high.

alexithymia.text: This Layer 1 lived pattern is often driven by Layer 0 emotional-signal decoding latency.

working-memory-reliability.text: This Layer 0 mechanism commonly expresses as Layer 1 continuity-of-self fragmentation when cross-time self and social threads drop out.

continuity-of-self.text: This Layer 1 lived pattern is often amplified by Layer 0 working-memory reliability instability.

emotional-permanence.text: This Layer 1 lived pattern is often shaped by Layer 0 working-memory reliability, especially in relationship carryover.

proprioceptive-calibration.text: This Layer 0 mechanism can accumulate into Layer 3 musculoskeletal strain when compensation patterns become chronic.

musculoskeletal-strain.text: This Layer 3 downstream pattern is often rooted in unresolved Layer 0 proprioceptive calibration uncertainty.
